reviews.comment:
Todo el tiempo cargo combustible en ACA,Y PAGO CON TODAS LAS FORMAS DE PAGOS,EXELENTE ATENCION

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up my tank at ACA, and I pay with all forms of payment. Excellent service.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu opinión. Te esperamos pronto.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9489607436873459405/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIb3JiQnNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal de playa y service. Los baños muy limpios, el lugar en general está limpio y en buenas condiciones, da gusto pasar por la estación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach staff and service personnel. The restrooms were very clean, the place in general is clean and in good condition; it's a pleasure to visit the station.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu comentario. Te esperamos nuevamente.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9489607436873459405/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIdkxLc3FRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención del playero tiene menos ganas de laburar que un Santiagueño.
No aceptan mercado pago, ni siquiera fue capaz de preguntar si quería repasar el vidrio un desastre. y en la otra YPF que está a una cuadra tampoco aceptan pagos con QR de mercado pago.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendant. He's less eager to work than a Santiagueño.
They don't accept Mercado Pago, he wasn't even able to ask if I wanted to clean the glass. It was a disaster. And the other YPF, a block away, doesn't accept QR codes from Mercado Pago either.
